name: 2000 Archives
tagline: Subversive Y2K grunge and vintage graphics inspired by early 2000s archives
descriptionZh: 2000 Archives 是首尔当下最受关注的千禧复古（Y2K）女性设计师品牌，灵感源自 2000 年代初的经典时尚档案。品牌以极具视觉冲击力的满版数码印花、破坏风紧身长筒袜和前卫的镂空解构设计而闻名。其代表作如足球印花T恤、朋克风涂鸦网纱上衣和复古低腰裙，释放出特立独行、张扬叛逆的千禧辣妹气场。
descriptionEn: 2000 Archives is a popular Seoul-based brand inspired by early 2000s vintage archives and Y2K subcultures. The brand is celebrated for its graphic-heavy digital prints, distressed stockings, and subversive cut-out silhouettes. Signature items like their soccer-inspired jersey tees, mesh tops, and low-rise skirts deliver a highly energetic, rebellious, and nostalgic Y2K aesthetic.

name: 66girls
tagline: Friendly, casual everyday wear for all body shapes and sizes
descriptionZh: 66girls 成立于 2008 年，以“让所有女孩穿上舒适漂亮的衣服”为初衷，是韩国最受欢迎的平价日常女装线上商城。品牌主打韩系温柔简约的大学学院风和邻家女孩风，尺码设计友好、定价亲民。其经典的针织马甲、宽松棉质衬衫和松紧腰休闲长裤，是韩国年轻女生日常上学与约会的首选。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2008, 66girls is a leading Korean online shopping mall dedicated to providing comfortable, fashionable daily clothing for all body sizes. The brand specializes in friendly, gentle Korean collegiate style and casual everyday aesthetics at highly affordable price points.

name: 8Seconds
tagline: Fast-fashion staples delivering the latest Seoul street trends in eight seconds
descriptionZh: 8Seconds 成立于 2012 年，由三星物产（Samsung C&T）倾力打造，是韩国本土最具代表性的快时尚巨头。品牌寓意“在八秒钟内捕捉顾客的眼球”，紧跟首尔最前沿的流行趋势，为大众提供海量、高性价比的休闲及职场穿搭。其王牌单品包括版型多样的丹宁裤、韩式松弛感羽绒服和百搭针织衫。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2012 by Samsung C&T, 8Seconds is South Korea's premier home-grown fast-fashion giant. The brand name reflects its goal to capture customers' attention within eight seconds with the latest trendy, affordable casual and office wear.

name: 99%IS-
tagline: Subversive, avant-garde punk streetwear designed by Bajowoo
descriptionZh: 99%IS- 是由鬼才设计师 Bajowoo 创立的韩国殿堂级先锋街头品牌。品牌将纯正的地下朋克文化与高级时装剪裁融合，以大量的拉链、金属铆钉、别针和夸张的绑带设计而震惊时尚圈。其标志性的拉链风暴防风服、手工做旧皮衣以及防毒面具帽，受到全球顶级潮流icon和摇滚明星的狂热追捧。
descriptionEn: Founded by designer Bajowoo, 99%IS- is a legendary avant-garde punk label that bridges underground subcultures and high fashion. The brand is renowned for its intense use of hardware, featuring custom zippers, metallic studs, safety pins, and intricate adjustable drawstrings.

name: Acme De La Vie (ADLV)
tagline: Comfortable streetwear and famous baby face prints
descriptionZh: Acme De La Vie (ADLV) 意为法语“人生的巅峰”，成立于2017年。品牌凭借印有超写实风格的“吃甜甜圈的宝宝”、“捂脸哭泣的宝宝”等婴儿大头照（Baby Face Series）的高克重厚实卫衣与T恤而在中韩两地一夜爆红。ADLV 主打日常的舒适度与趣味潮流印花的结合，面料克重扎实、剪裁超级宽松，深受明星及大众消费者的追捧。
descriptionEn: Acme De La Vie (ADLV), meaning 'pinnacle of life' in French, was founded in 2017. The brand achieved instant pan-Asian viral success with its 'Baby Face' series—premium heavy-weight hoodies and tees featuring close-up prints of expressive children eating donuts or crying. ADLV focuses on cozy, street-ready, and playful daily wear.

name: ADER Error
tagline: Gender-fluid Seoul streetwear and avant-garde design
descriptionZh: ADER Error 成立于2014年，是韩国最具代表性的解构主义潮流品牌。品牌设计理念为 'But near missed things'（身边被忽略的事物），善于将复古美学与前卫街头风格结合。标志性的克莱因蓝（Ader Blue）、宽松剪裁、破洞、毛边、拼接以及充满趣味的图章是其核心设计元素。ADER 不仅是一个时尚品牌，更是一个融合艺术、设计与生活的创意团体。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2014, ADER Error is one of South Korea's most influential avant-garde streetwear brands. Driven by the philosophy 'But near missed things,' the label is renowned for its deconstructive silhouettes, signature Klein blue palette, retro-futuristic graphics, and unisex designs. ADER Error operates as a creative collective bridging fashion, art, and lifestyle.

name: Amomento
tagline: Architectural silhouette, modern minimalism, and organic materials
descriptionZh: Amomento 成立于2016年，由 Lee Mee-kyung 创立，最初是一个极简买手店品牌。品牌主打建筑般的结构轮廓与中性自然色系。Amomento 极度关注面料的触感（纯麻、皱褶棉、绗缝轻量化面料）和廓形的量感，经典款如绗缝收腰外套、极简系带裙和宽松收口长裤。其美学风格低调、安静且拥有强大的艺术张力，将日系冷淡与韩系智性美合二为一。
descriptionEn: Established in 2016 by Lee Mee-kyung, Amomento is a high-concept minimalist label that prioritizes architectural form, organic crinkly textures, and natural fibers like raw cotton and linen. The brand delivers quiet, structured outerwear, wrap dresses, and cocoon pants in a muted palette, blending Eastern zen with intellectual chic.

name: Andersson Bell
tagline: Scandinavian-Korean crossover contemporary fashion
descriptionZh: Andersson Bell 成立于2014年，是一个将北欧简约实用主义与韩式街头潮流完美融合的时尚品牌。品牌名称融合了瑞典代表性姓氏 Andersson 与象征寺庙的 Bell，代表着东西方文化的碰撞。Andersson Bell 极具辨识度，其设计大量采用撞色拼接、重工针织提花、不对称剪裁和多元材质拼接，展现出别具一格的无性别时尚美学。
descriptionEn: Launched in Seoul in 2014, Andersson Bell reinterprets Scandinavian minimalism through a vibrant Korean streetwear lens. The name reflects a cultural contrast, pairing a Swedish surname with the traditional Korean temple bell. The brand is celebrated for its genderless appeal, eccentric color contrasts, artisanal knitwear, and heavy patchwork details.

name: Archivepke
tagline: Soft leather footwear and accessories for a refined daily lifestyle
descriptionZh: Archivepke 是一家专注于羊皮等超软皮质的韩国鞋履与包袋品牌，意为“记录日常生活的美学”。品牌致力于将柔软舒适的触觉体验与流线形的现代外观相结合，打破硬质皮具的沉闷。其最具人气的平底羊皮芭蕾舞鞋、流线形软皮腋下包和穆勒鞋，以绝佳的舒适度和高级配色深受亚洲女性喜爱。
descriptionEn: Archivepke is a popular shoe and bag label that designs around the concept of creating soft leather goods for daily comfort. Utilizing premium, buttery-soft sheepskin, the brand constructs sleek, lightweight silhouettes that break away from heavy, stiff leather.

name: Atelier Park
tagline: Bold geometric handbags and accessories playing with vibrant colors
descriptionZh: Atelier Park 成立于首尔，是一个将几何线条美学与大胆的趣味拼色玩转到极致的包袋品牌。品牌善于利用拼接色块、梯形和三角几何形状，赋予传统手袋耳目一新的现代艺术雕塑感。其经典的三角形拼色粽子包（Triangle Bag）和手提水饺包，以超高辨识度的外形和活力色彩，成为了时髦都市女性的街拍利器。
descriptionEn: Atelier Park is a Seoul-based accessory and bag label celebrated for its playful play with color-blocking and geometric shapes. Reinterpreting traditional bag styles, the brand constructs modern structured pieces like triangles, trapezoids, and circles that resemble wearable sculptures.

name: Badblood
tagline: Sexy, sporty, and body-hugging western-style streetwear
descriptionZh: Badblood 成立于2016年，是韩国少有的主打欧美火辣性感风格（Western Sporty Baddie）的本土潮牌。品牌彻底颠覆了韩系温柔风，以极具贴身塑形剪裁的连体衣、高腰包臀运动裤、露脐工装运动Bra和性感挖空拉链衫而闻名。其服饰融合了健身房运动机能与洛杉矶街头辣妹风格，展现出自信、健康且火辣的力量之美。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2016, Badblood is a pioneer in bringing bold, body-con, and athletic Western streetwear ('baddie' aesthetic) to the Korean fashion market. Ditching soft pastel colors, Badblood offers tight bodysuits, high-waist sweatpants, crop zip-ups, and skin-tight ribbed knits that celebrate athletic curves and streetwear attitude.

name: Beanpole
tagline: High-end traditional British-style casual wear with a modern Korean heritage
descriptionZh: Beanpole 成立于 1989 年，是三星物产旗下的国宝级高级英伦休闲品牌，以其标志性的“大轮自行车”徽标深入人心。品牌主打高贵典雅的英式常春藤学院风（Ivy League），极其讲究面料的品质与英伦经典格纹的开发。其经典的重磅羊毛大衣、牛角扣夹克以及英伦格纹衬衫，是韩国家喻户晓的经典品质代表。
descriptionEn: Established in 1989 by Samsung C&T, Beanpole is a prestigious Korean heritage brand, recognizable by its iconic penny-farthing bicycle logo. The brand reinterprets classic British Ivy League and preppy aesthetics with high-quality natural wools.

name: Beslow
tagline: High-quality classic workwear and casual military setups
descriptionZh: Beslow 是韩国工装与阿美咔叽风潮的代表品牌，主打“穿搭慢生活（Slow Fashion）”概念。品牌专注于高品质的棉麻工装、宽松的西服套装和经典军装大衣，版型注重穿着的舒适性与易搭配度。其极具代表性的休闲双排扣便服西装、宽松军风夹克和直筒工装裤，是日常通勤穿搭的万能单品。
descriptionEn: Beslow is a key player in the Korean heritage workwear and casual military scene, emphasizing accessible slow fashion. The brand specializes in high-quality cotton setups, loose tailoring, and classic utility parkas designed for easy coordination.

name: Beyond Closet
tagline: Classic American preppy style with a witty, youthful Korean twist
descriptionZh: Beyond Closet 由设计师高兑溶创立，以衣橱为载体，表达穿着者的个性和生活态度。品牌主打美式经典学院风（Preppy Style），并创新地融入了趣味性与韩式潮流元素。其中最著名的“I Love Pet”系列，因衣服上印有戴眼镜的可爱小狗针织图案而红遍亚洲，成为青春学院感穿搭的首选。
descriptionEn: Founded by Ko Tae Yong, Beyond Closet reinterprets traditional American preppy style with a playful, youthful Korean twist. The name implies looking beyond the wardrobe to discover one's unique lifestyle and character.

name: BLANKOF
tagline: Aesthetic minimalism and military-grade durability in travel gear
descriptionZh: BLANKOF 是由 Won Deok-hyun 于 2011 年创立的顶级小众包袋及配饰品牌。品牌遵循“Neat and Proper”（整洁得体）的信条，去除所有繁杂的装饰，用防弹尼龙等军事级耐磨面料打造极简包具。其代表性的盔甲包（Helmet Bag）、双肩背包和旅行袋深受都市精英好评。
descriptionEn: Established in 2011 by Won Deok-hyun, BLANKOF is a high-end minimalist bag and accessory label. Adhering to a 'Neat and Proper' ethos, the brand strips away redundant details, utilizing high-performance, military-grade materials like ballistic nylon for maximum durability.

name: Blossom
tagline: Timeless sophisticated womenswear showcasing natural elegance and sharp tailoring
descriptionZh: Blossom（亦称 Blossom H Company）是韩国本土备受都市高级职场女性推崇的质感女装品牌。品牌追求不随时间消逝的优雅力量，强调利落高超的西装裁剪、流线形大衣轮廓和高档天然羊毛材质。其经典的落肩羊毛大衣、阔腿垂坠长裤以及剪裁干练的衬衫，处处展现出独立成熟女性的洒脱气场。
descriptionEn: Blossom (operating as Blossom H Company) is a highly respected Korean brand offering refined contemporary womenswear. Embracing the concept of timeless elegance, the brand focuses on structured tailoring, clean lines, and premium wool fabrications.

name: BONBOM
tagline: Subversive tailoring and sensual couture-level streetwear
descriptionZh: BONBOM 是由毕业于伦敦时装学院的设计师 Jo Bonbom 于 2020 年创立的无性别前卫品牌。品牌将高级男装裁剪技术与街头潮流文化相结合，主打充满叛逆色彩和挑逗性细节的“现代高级定制”。其标志性单品如带有金属穿孔与皮带扣的高工装外套、不对称西装以及雕塑感运动服，频繁亮相于 K-pop 顶级天团的打歌舞台。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2020 by London College of Fashion graduate Jo Bonbom, BONBOM is a high-end streetwear label defined by subversive tailoring and sharp contours. Bridging the gap between activewear, classic tailoring, and underground subcultures, the brand incorporates fetish-adjacent details, piercing accents, and modular harnesses. Its structured blazers, cut-out track jackets, and reconstructed trousers have made it a favorite performance wear for global K-pop stars.

name: Brownyard
tagline: Comfort-driven casual wear featuring relaxed shapes and natural tones
descriptionZh: Brownyard 致力于在穿着舒适度与摩登都市感之间寻找完美的平衡。品牌选用温润舒适的天然面料，主打卡其色、军绿、藏青等大地自然色系，呈现出慵懒而质朴的日式阿美咔叽与韩式工装风。其代表作包括宽松的水洗工装裤、多口袋夹克和舒适的棉质衬衫。
descriptionEn: Brownyard centers its designs on finding a stable balance between daily comfort and natural urban aesthetics. Using premium washed cottons and linen blends, the brand offers a muted palette of earthy, organic tones suitable for effortless layering. Signature items include wide utility cargo pants, multi-pocket chore jackets, and relaxed daily shirts.

name: Cherrykoko
tagline: Sweet romantic feminine wear with classic details and soft pastel tones
descriptionZh: Cherrykoko 是韩国极具知名度的轻熟浪漫淑女风线上品牌，在年轻白领群体中极具口碑。品牌主打温婉柔和的粉白、浅绿等莫兰迪色系，选用挺括有质感的蕾丝与雪纺面料。旗下大热的单品包括小翻领法式连衣裙、蕾丝花边衬衫和浅色收腰大衣，呈现出端庄、甜美而温柔的气质。
descriptionEn: Cherrykoko is a renowned Korean womenswear brand offering romantic, feminine collections for young professionals. Featuring soft pastel hues and refined fabrics like chiffon and lace, the brand crafts classic pieces that exude a gentle charm.

name: Chuu
tagline: Lovely, cute, and sweet feminine fashion for everyday confidence
descriptionZh: Chuu 是韩国非常具有人气的甜美可爱风少女品牌，以青春洋溢、活力四射的设计风格著称。品牌凭借其大名鼎鼎的“5公斤牛仔裤（-5kg Jeans）”瘦身系列而红遍全球，成为韩系甜妹穿搭的标配。其经典的泡泡袖连衣裙、马卡龙色系毛衣和印花短卫衣，展现出元气满满的少女力。
descriptionEn: Chuu is a highly popular Korean fashion brand celebrated for its cute, sweet, and lively feminine aesthetic. The brand achieved global fame with its iconic '-5kg Jeans' series, designed to create a slimmer and elongated silhouette.

name: Common Unique
tagline: Elegant minimalist daily staples with a unique, sensible touch
descriptionZh: Common Unique 是韩国现代都市女性十分钟爱的简约设计感女装商城。品牌主打在简约实穿的日常版型中融入不易察觉的别致细节，展现温柔知性的韩系淑女气场。其经典的雪纺蝴蝶结衬衫、垂坠感西装短裤和宽松通勤衬衫，频繁亮相于各大热门韩剧女主的日常穿搭中。
descriptionEn: Common Unique is a beloved Korean online store that offers simple yet uniquely detailed garments for the modern woman. The brand specializes in comfortable daily staples, soft color palettes, and feminine silhouettes that look effortlessly sophisticated.

name: Covernat
tagline: Casual military, workwear, and outdoor-inspired vintage prep
descriptionZh: Covernat 成立于2008年，由 Yoonsu Hyung 创办，是韩国复古美式休闲服饰（Amekaji / City Boy）的开山鼻祖。品牌名取自“Needle and Thread”（针线）与“Covington”（纺织重镇）的结合。Covernat 将经典的军事风、美式工装与户外露营元素改良成适合亚洲人身型的日常休闲服。其经典字母印花卫衣、C字棒球帽、羽绒服及帆布包是韩国国民级的常青单品。
descriptionEn: Established in 2008, Covernat is a pioneer in localizing American vintage military, outdoor workwear, and classic ivy-league aesthetics for South Korea (the 'Amekaji' style). Featuring collegiate lettering sweatshirts, C-logo varsity baseball caps, utility puffers, and canvas sacks, Covernat stands as a beloved staple of Korean daily wear.

name: Curetty
tagline: Vibrant retro Y2K street style celebrating youth and individual confidence
descriptionZh: Curetty 的品牌名融合了“Cute（可爱）”与“Pretty（漂亮）”，是一个充满活力与反叛精神的千禧女装品牌。品牌善于将复古的学院风格、叛逆的摇滚街头元素与多变性感的剪裁融为一体。其经典的短款字母印花T恤、百褶迷你裙及针织开衫，流露出自信张扬的复古辣妹风格。
descriptionEn: Combining the words 'cute' and 'pretty,' Curetty is a young womenswear brand representing early 2000s street style. The brand infuses collegiate preppy themes, grunge-rock influences, and body-hugging cut-outs to express confidence and youth culture.

name: Customellow
tagline: Menswear-focused smart-casual reinterpreting classics with a playful, artistic twist
descriptionZh: Customellow 是科隆集团旗下的男装复古风尚代表品牌，名字由“Custom（定制）”与“Mellow（温和）”结合而成。品牌将严谨的传统男装定制工艺融入轻松幽默的艺术插画和复古撞色，倡导“将趣味穿在身上”的生活态度。其经典的格纹便服西装、复古工装衬衫和艺术联名印花T恤，深受注重品位的轻熟都市男士欢迎。
descriptionEn: Customellow is a prominent smart-casual label under Kolon, combining the words 'custom' and 'mellow.' The brand specializes in reinterpreting classic menswear tailoring with artistic details, retro colors, and a playful, modern twist.

name: D.Gnak
tagline: Achromatic, avant-garde tailoring and dark-wear silhouettes
descriptionZh: D.Gnak 由设计师康东俊创立，其品牌名是设计师姓氏“Kang”颠倒后的重组，是韩国先锋暗黑美学的领军人物。品牌擅长以黑白色调（Achromatic）为核心，将前卫剪裁和解构褶皱融入传统男装。其经典的解构双扣大衣、后交叉绑带运动鞋以及宽腿堆积裤，展现出极强的立体雕塑感。
descriptionEn: D.Gnak, a phonetic anagram of designer Kang Dong Jun's surname, is a leading voice in South Korea's dark, avant-garde menswear scene. The brand focuses on monochromatic palettes, structured tailoring, and asymmetrical silhouettes.

name: Darkvictory
tagline: Bold, sexy, and chic contemporary streetwear for the confident woman
descriptionZh: Darkvictory 是一家主打欧美性感街头风与干练辣妹风的韩国女性线上潮牌。品牌设计极具视觉张力，善于运用修身剪裁、露腰镂空以及高腰线条，打造出利落帅气又不失性感的女性形象。其爆款的高腰弹力喇叭裤、紧身短款针织衫和毛边牛仔外套，深受酷女孩的追捧。
descriptionEn: Darkvictory is a Korean women's label focusing on edgy, bold, and sexy western-inspired street fashion. The brand emphasizes body-hugging silhouettes, cropped details, and dramatic waistlines to showcase a confident, chic attitude.

name: Depound
tagline: Eco-friendly canvas tote bags and aesthetic Parisian lifestyle
descriptionZh: Depound 成立于2016年，以“将自然融入日常生活”为初衷。品牌最初凭借印有艺术感英文字体的环保帆布包、麻质托特包和简约帆布袋而在亚洲爆火，随后扩展到成衣品类。Depound 的服饰拥有极高的美学格调，主打干净的奶油白色系、淡雅的条纹衬衫和松弛针织。品牌崇尚慢节奏的法式下午茶生活方式，精致而低调。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2016, Depound is a lifestyle brand that builds natural everyday products. Gaining popularity through its minimalist typographic canvas tote bags and eco-friendly shopping bags, Depound now features relaxed linen shirts, classic striped knits, and home accessories that bring a sense of cozy Parisian romance to daily life.

name: Diagonal
tagline: Dynamic, sensuous silhouettes with asymmetric shapes and cut-out details
descriptionZh: Diagonal 是首尔大火的先锋女性品牌，以其标志性的斜线切割（Diagonal）和不对称解构设计而得名。品牌倡导打破常规的穿着方式，利用巧妙的露肤、扭拧折叠和拼贴设计，展露出女性灵动而性感的现代美。其不对称挂脖上衣、镂空针织衫以及不对称裹身裙是其高人气单品。
descriptionEn: Named after its signature slanted cuts and asymmetric structures, Diagonal is a trending Seoul womenswear label. The brand specializes in reinterpreting standard shapes through sensuous cut-outs, twisted draping, and raw paneled textures that emphasize the feminine form.

name: Dunst
tagline: Classy minimalist everyday essentials and tailored outerwear
descriptionZh: Dunst 成立于2019年，最初是韩国时尚巨头 LF 集团旗下的独立设计企划，现已独立运营。Dunst 译为“无形之雾”，代表不受性别和风格界限约束。品牌主打复古质感、高级剪裁与都市常青藤风格。其羊毛大衣、皮革夹克、宽松西装和基础款卫衣做工扎实、版型无可挑剔，以极其极简、日常的低调贵气美学（Quiet Luxury）深受都市男女喜爱。
descriptionEn: Established in 2019, Dunst operates as a design studio crafting timeless everyday essentials. The name 'Dunst' (meaning vapor or haze) symbolizes freedom from gender and style boundaries. The label excels in classic wool coats, leather blazers, and clean-cut basics that offer a quiet, high-quality, and sophisticated wardrobe.

name: Eastlogue
tagline: Premium heritage menswear reinterpreting vintage military and active sportswear
descriptionZh: Eastlogue 成立于 2011 年，由设计师李东基创立，是韩国最高端、最受尊敬的阿美咔叽与复古军事男装品牌。品牌名称融合了“East（东方）”与“Travelogue（旅行日志）”，代表用东方视角探索世界服饰历史。品牌推崇在韩国本土手工制作，以极其繁复的口袋拉链细节、高科技防水面料以及奢华皮革的拼接闻名，其猎装夹克与羽绒外套堪称工装领域的艺术品。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2011 by designer Dongki Lee, Eastlogue is a premium Korean menswear label that reinterprets vintage military, hunting, fishing, and active sportswear. The name combines 'East' and 'Travelogue,' showcasing a desire to document fashion history through a unique eastern perspective. Locally manufactured in Korea, the brand is celebrated for its heavy patchworks, complex pocket layouts, high-performance tech fabrics, and exceptional outerwear like their utility down parkas and hunting jackets.

name: EENK
tagline: Artistic contemporary high-fashion and structured designs
descriptionZh: EENK 由知名设计师 Lee Hyemee 于2013年创立。品牌以极具创意性的“字母计划（The Letter Project）”闻名，从 A 到 Z 每一季分别代表不同的主题和字母。EENK 模糊了高级定制与街头成衣的边界，以强烈的建筑几何线条、撞色缝线、重工提花面料和标志性的黄铜搭扣件包包闻名，深受前卫艺术买手和时尚业内人士推崇。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2013 by designer Hyemee Lee, EENK is a premium contemporary luxury label driven by 'The Letter Project'—an alphabetic series where each season focuses on a letter from A to Z. EENK is famous for its structural volume, rich textile textures, and custom brass hardware that bridge luxury craftsmanship with wearability.

name: ETER
tagline: Modern minimalist gender-neutral basics made with premium craftsmanship
descriptionZh: ETER 是韩国当代主打高品质基础服饰的极简主义中性品牌。品牌以“舒适与质感共存”为宗旨，选用法国毛圈棉、羊绒混纺等高端料质，在经典的版型中追求最极致的缝制工艺与版型调试。其经典的重磅毛圈卫衣、利落的长袖T恤和针织运动裤，完美契合都市人群对低调奢华日常服的需求。
descriptionEn: ETER is a contemporary, genderless Korean brand that specializes in high-quality minimalist basics. Committed to merging ultimate comfort with structural quality, the label utilizes premium fabrics like French terry cotton and cashmere blends.

name: Fennec
tagline: Trendy, colorful small leather goods and minimalist functional bags
descriptionZh: Fennec 成立于首尔，是韩国最具人气的小众皮具配饰品牌，以设计简约、色彩极为丰富而著称。品牌专注于打造实用且具设计感的拉链皮夹、卡包、迷你链条包等配饰，每年均会推出引领潮流的新色系。其招牌的正方形拉链钱包与多卡位卡夹，凭借细腻的牛皮质感和极高的实用性，成为了韩国年轻人人手一个的潮流标配。
descriptionEn: Based in Seoul, Fennec is a cult-favorite leather goods brand known for its minimalist structures and exceptionally vibrant color palettes. The brand specializes in high-quality zip-around wallets, card cases, and mini phone bags, releasing new signature color stories each season.

name: Find Kapoor
tagline: Stylish, structural everyday handbags with vibrant colors and modern practicality
descriptionZh: Find Kapoor 成立于 2016 年，是韩国极具知名度的小众时尚包袋品牌，以时尚与艺术的结合为创作初衷。品牌致力于打破常规包袋的沉闷，通过明亮大胆的拼色和多变的肩带搭配，为都市女性提供极具个性表达的饰品。其标志性的 Pingo（平果包）水桶包和 Marty 豆腐包，以精巧的几何廓形和超高的实用性价比风靡亚洲。
descriptionEn: Established in 2016, Find Kapoor is a prominent Korean handbag brand that blends modern fashion with fine arts. The label focuses on creating structural, lightweight everyday bags that stand out through bold color-blocking, custom-made straps, and unique geometric silhouettes. Its signature Pingo bucket bag and Marty shoulder bags are widely popular for their playful versatility, clean lines, and highly accessible price point.

name: FrizmWORKS
tagline: Detail-driven utilitarian workwear and classic military-inspired garments
descriptionZh: FrizmWORKS 成立于 2010 年，是韩国极具代表性的复古工装与军事风男装品牌。品牌名由“Freeze（冻结）”与“Prism（三棱镜）”组合而成，意在将多元的设计灵感固化为高品质的产品。旗下单品如气球工装裤、重磅帆布阿美咔叽夹克和军风派克大衣，以扎实的缝线、扎实的耐磨面料以及超高性价比深受工装迷喜爱。
descriptionEn: Established in 2010, FrizmWORKS is a details-obsessed Korean brand specializing in military, workwear, and heritage apparel. Combining 'Freeze' and 'Prism,' the name reflects their commitment to locking in diverse design colors and high craftsmanship. Signature pieces like their balloon trousers, heavy canvas jackets, and military parkas are celebrated for their rugged durability, intricate tailoring details, and casual utility.

name: Gentle Monster
tagline: Avant-garde luxury eyewear and high-concept experimental retail
descriptionZh: Gentle Monster 由 Hankook Kim 于2011年创办，是享誉全球的先锋太阳镜及眼镜品牌。品牌以天马行空的多彩镜片、前卫无框、猫眼几何造型眼镜闻名。更震撼的是其“奇幻剧场”般的线下空间设计，每家店都是融合机械动力雕塑、现代艺术装置的感官体验馆。Gentle Monster 彻底打破了眼镜作为医疗配饰的传统定位，将其塑造成先锋的潮流时尚利器。
descriptionEn: Founded by Hankook Kim in 2011, Gentle Monster is a global designer eyewear brand famous for its avant-garde cat-eye sunglasses, thick acetate frames, and futuristic collections. The label is equally famous for its high-concept retail showrooms, which function as interactive art exhibitions complete with kinetic humanoid robotics.

name: GLOWNY
tagline: Romantic retro-girlish style with soft silhouettes and everyday comfort
descriptionZh: GLOWNY（前身为 Spooning）是一个主打复古美式学院与温柔少女感融合的韩国当红品牌。品牌注重舒适的面料质地与勾勒女性身材曲线的剪裁，旨在传递自由、自爱与自信的现代女性态度。其经典单品包括印有“G”字母的婴儿T恤、饰有蕾丝与花边的吊带小吊带以及充满复古情怀的针织套衫。
descriptionEn: Formerly known as Spooning, GLOWNY is a cult-favorite Korean label that delivers a romantic, retro-girlish aesthetic. The brand focuses on soft, body-hugging knits, delicate details, and comfy basics that celebrate the natural female form. Signature pieces like their 'G' baby tees, lace-trimmed camisoles, and ruffled knit skirts offer an effortless blend of 90s nostalgia and cozy femininity.

name: Grove (Grove Store)
tagline: Classic vintage French-casual everyday womenswear
descriptionZh: Grove Store 成立于2014年，是首尔温婉法式复古休闲风的标杆。品牌设计致敬1960年代的复古学院风，致力于将经典的日常服饰注入自然、活泼的柔和色调。Grove Store 的羊毛开衫、百褶半身裙、复古翻领卫衣以及宽松衬衫做工精细，整体穿搭偏向日常、清新却拥有复古质感，深受追求知性小红书风格的韩系女生喜爱。
descriptionEn: Established in 2014, Grove Store delivers classic vintage French-casual wear designed for modern daily styling. Inspired by 1960s collegiate preppy wear, the collection focuses on soft pastel knits, retro polo collars, pleated wool skirts, and oversized shirts that radiate warmth, charm, and understated quality.

name: Hazzys
tagline: Classic British traditional casual wear blended with modern urban lifestyle
descriptionZh: Hazzys 成立于 2000 年，是 LF 集团旗下的高端英伦休闲时尚品牌，名字来源于英国著名的赛艇俱乐部。品牌融合了英国传统的贵族气息与现代都市年轻人的活力，以皇家犬刺绣Logo为特色。旗下经典的牛津纺衬衫、修身 Polo 衫、羊绒针织衫和休闲包袋，在实穿中流露出精致体面的绅士穿搭。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2000 by LF Group, Hazzys is a premium British traditional casual brand named after an elite English rowing club and marked by its signature English pointer dog logo. The label blends classic aristocratic heritage with modern urban active lifestyles.

name: Hotping
tagline: Accessible, trendy fashion from sizes XS to 3XL with ultimate comfort
descriptionZh: Hotping 是韩国非常具有代表性的全尺码（XS-3XL）快时尚女性线上品牌，意为“让人心跳的粉红色”。品牌主打多样化的风格，从职场通勤、甜美约会到日常居家一应俱全，并以极强的穿着弹性与舒适体验著称。旗下著名的“魔术裤”系列因超强的弹力与显瘦版型，在亚洲地区创造了数百万条的惊人销量。
descriptionEn: Hotping is a prominent Korean inclusive fast-fashion brand, offering a wide array of styles from size XS to 3XL. Meaning 'heart-fluttering pink,' the label designs versatile outfits for work, dates, and lounging, emphasizing stretch and comfort. Its signature 'Magic Pants' series is celebrated across Asia for its exceptional stretchability.

name: Hyein Seo
tagline: Dystopian tactical cyber-streetwear and genderless utility
descriptionZh: Hyein Seo 由设计师徐惠仁于2014年创立，毕业于著名的安特卫普皇家艺术学院。品牌主打末日废土（Dystopian）、战术机能（Tactical Utility）与反叛青年亚文化风格。设计中充满绑带、战术胸包、多口袋工装和紧身挂脖剪裁，展现出极强的侵略性与英气。Hyein Seo 巧妙地利用不对称镂空和不对称纽扣设计，将机能街头服饰塑造成充满科技感的高级成衣。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2014 by Antwerp Royal Academy graduate Hyein Seo, the label is a leading voice in dystopian, cyber-tactical streetwear. Infused with rebel youth subcultures, the collection features harness detailing, modular crop shirts, asymmetric cutouts, and technical fabrics that paint a cyberpunk picture of modern fashion.

name: IISE
tagline: Modern streetwear reinterpreting Korean heritage with technical fabrics
descriptionZh: IISE 意为“第二代”，是一个致力于用现代街头潮流语境重新诠释韩国传统文化的先锋品牌。品牌巧妙地将传统韩服（Hanbok）的交领结构、天然草木染工艺与现代机能防水面料完美重组。其经典单品包括韩服立领防风夹克、褶皱战术长裤和极简机能背包，极具东方赛博朋克风情。
descriptionEn: Meaning 'second generation' in Korean, IISE merges traditional Korean culture with contemporary streetwear and technical fabrics. The label fuses Hanbok-inspired overlapping collars and natural dye techniques with high-tech elements like GORE-TEX and tactical utility pockets.

name: Insilence
tagline: Minimalist contemporary tailoring with structured, modern proportions
descriptionZh: Insilence 成立于 2013 年，是韩国现代极简风尚的代表性品牌。品牌秉持“于无声处见匠心”的理念，专注于利落的西装裁剪、硬挺的大衣版型以及考究的羊毛面料。其经典单品如落肩双排扣羊毛大衣、解构西装夹克和皮质外套，为都市男女提供了极高性价比的智性穿搭。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2013, Insilence is a contemporary minimalist brand known for its structured tailoring and refined modern proportions. The label focuses on clean lines, high-quality wool blends, and smart daily wear that balances comfort and elegance. Signature items like their double-breasted wool overcoats, tailored blazers, and leather jackets are staple choices for modern urbanites.

name: Instantfunk
tagline: Unisex retro-contemporary casual wear with a stylish celebrity edge
descriptionZh: Instantfunk 由韩国顶级明星造型师金智惠创立，品牌融合了即兴流行（Instant）与独特的反叛个性（Funk）。品牌主打无性别界限的复古英伦与美式街头风，以大气的版型和极其出挑的色彩搭配闻名。其王牌单品包括落肩皮夹克、不对称修身牛仔裤以及经典的双排扣西装。
descriptionEn: Founded by Korea's leading celebrity stylist Kim Ji-hye, Instantfunk merges improvisational pop ('instant') with rebellious individuality ('funk'). The brand presents gender-neutral, retro-contemporary streetwear that reinterprets classic silhouettes with an effortless celebrity style.

name: JIYONGKIM
tagline: Sustainable avant-garde fashion defined by one-of-a-kind sun-bleached textiles
descriptionZh: JIYONGKIM 是由设计师金地容创立的同名先锋男装品牌，以极具革命性的“日光漂白（Sun-Bleaching）”工艺闻名于世。品牌拒绝使用化学染料，而是将布料置于户外数月，接受日晒、雨淋与风化，从而形成自然且无法复制的渐变肌理。其解构风外套、褶皱衬衫和垂坠感长裤，将环保理念与极具艺术感的先锋廓形完美融合。
descriptionEn: JIYONGKIM is an avant-garde menswear label founded by Jiyong Kim, celebrated globally for its revolutionary 'Sun-Bleach' process. Instead of chemical dyeing, the brand exposes deadstock and vintage fabrics to the natural elements—sun, wind, and rain—for months, creating unique, unrelicatable weathered patters. The brand's signature deconstructed trench coats, drapes, and organic textured trousers merge artisanal sustainability with high-fashion tailoring.

name: Juun.J
tagline: Parisian avant-garde oversized street-tailoring and leather
descriptionZh: Juun.J 由设计师 Jung Wook-jun 于2007年在巴黎创立，隶属于三星物产时尚部门。品牌以惊世骇俗的“超大廓形（Oversized Silhouette）”和“街头裁缝（Street Tailoring）”概念改写了巴黎男装的规则。Juun.J 善于将极硬挺的皮革、尼龙军事野战夹克（M-65）与精湛的传统毛料西装解构融合，展现出充满未来主义、沉稳而又有破坏力的暗黑先锋时尚感。
descriptionEn: Debuted in Paris in 2007 by Jung Wook-jun, Juun.J is a world-renowned avant-garde luxury house under Samsung C&T. Juun.J is famous for pioneering the 'Street Tailoring' concept and pushing the limits of oversized silhouettes, deconstructing military MA-1 bombers, leather jackets, and structural blazers with cyber-artistic edge.

name: Kanghyuk
tagline: Repurposed automotive airbags and experimental high-fashion
descriptionZh: Kanghyuk 成立于2017年，由 Kanghyuk Choi 和 Sanglak Shon 创立，曾入围享誉全球的 LVMH 青年设计师大奖赛。品牌因开创性地使用**“报废汽车安全气囊”**作为制衣主面料而震惊世界时装界。气囊面料天然的尼龙耐磨质感、未拆解的红色/蓝色条纹定位线以及独特的编织网格，被解构重组为充满概念张力的工业机能艺术成衣。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2017 by Choi Kang-hyuk and Shon Sang-lak, Kanghyuk is a highly conceptual avant-garde house. Nominated for the LVMH Prize, the label is legendary for creating technical utility wear using recycled industrial car airbags. The airbag fabrics' natural red stitch guidelines, nylon texture, and air grids offer a striking post-industrial military vibe.

name: KIJUN
tagline: Cinematic nostalgia and playful retro-sporty womenswear
descriptionZh: KIJUN 成立于 2018 年，名字意为韩语中的“标准”，是由设计师 Shin Myung-jun 创立的复古女装品牌。品牌深受 80 至 90 年代首尔街头风尚的启发，善于将充满戏剧感的电影美学和复古运动元素注入现代日常服。其标志性单品包括拼色复古运动夹克、俏皮的印花紧身T恤和蓬松尼龙包，极具青春活力与玩味特质。
descriptionEn: Established in 2018, KIJUN (meaning 'standard' in Korean) is a women's wear brand that draws inspiration from 1980s and 90s Seoul youth fashion. The brand reimagines retro-sporty items and cinematic aesthetics through bold color blocking and playful proportions. Key items include vintage-inspired track jackets, kitsch graphic tees, and puffy nylon bags that evoke a high-energy, nostalgic street look.

name: Kimhekim
tagline: Haute couture romance, signature giant bows, and feminine pearls
descriptionZh: Kimhekim 由设计师 Kiminte Kimhekim 于2014年创立，他曾就职于巴黎高定名门 Balenciaga。品牌秉承巴黎高定（Haute Couture）手工艺，最著名的设计元素是夸张的“超大蝴蝶结（Giant Bow）”、珍珠纽扣和薄纱拼接。设计融合了浪漫主义、极简主义与戏剧张力。其珍珠夹扣凉鞋、爱心印花鞋、大蝴蝶结西服裙既古灵精怪又散发着贵族少女般的浪漫奢华感。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2014 by Balenciaga-alumnus Kiminte Kimhekim, this Parisian-presented house translates haute couture drama into ready-to-wear luxury. Infused with romance and wit, Kimhekim is globally celebrated for its signature giant fabric bows, sheer organza fabrics, and pearl accessories that evoke a playful princess aesthetic.

name: Kindersalmon
tagline: Elegant feminine classics defined by subtle, quietly unconventional proportions
descriptionZh: Kindersalmon 成立于 2013 年，是一个追求“低调的不规则感”的都市现代女装品牌。品牌重视流畅的剪裁结构和极富艺术感的廓形塑造，善于通过精细的褶皱与垂坠呈现优雅气息。其经典的缎面褶皱衬衫、落肩大衣和拼色皮靴，散发着独立女性特有的知性与深邃感。
descriptionEn: Established in 2013, Kindersalmon is a contemporary womenswear brand known for its quietly unconventional and refined aesthetics. The label emphasizes structural tailoring, premium textures, and delicate draping techniques that elevate traditional classics.

name: Kirsh
tagline: Youthful lifestyle casualwear and the famous signature cherry logo
descriptionZh: Kirsh 成立于2015年，是一个极富少女元气与甜美青春活力的日常服饰品牌。品牌最醒目的标志是印在衣服胸口或中心处的“两颗大红樱桃（Cherry Logo）”。Kirsh 主打清新活泼的马卡龙色系卫衣、针织马甲、百褶裙和帆布斜挎包。它代表着活泼、明朗、不受约束的少女感穿搭美学，在亚洲学生群体以及偶像爱豆私服中出镜率极高。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2015, Kirsh is a vibrant youth-lifestyle brand instantly recognizable by its signature large red cherry graphic printed across sweatshirts, knit vests, and baby tees. Characterized by playful pastel colors, athletic skirts, and canvas messenger bags, Kirsh embodies bright, cute, and high-energy preppy streetwear.

name: Kuho
tagline: High-end architectural minimalism and structural Korean luxury womenswear
descriptionZh: Kuho 是三星物产旗下最高端、最享誉国内外的极简主义代表性女装品牌。品牌深受建筑美学启发，摈弃多余的琐碎装饰，仅凭绝妙的立体三维剪裁、顶级纯天然面料和内敛的暗门襟设计，打造极高智感的“静奢”美学。其立领羊毛风衣、雕塑感垂坠连衣裙和极简线条针织衫，体现了韩国高级女装的最高水平。
descriptionEn: Owned by Samsung C&T, Kuho is South Korea's premier high-end luxury brand specializing in architectural minimalism. Drawing inspiration from 3D structures, the label relies on exquisite sculptural draping, top-tier natural fabrics, and hidden fastening systems.

name: KUSIKOHC
tagline: Avant-garde, conceptual fashion embracing artistic risk and the beauty of failure
descriptionZh: KUSIKOHC 由韩国知名摄影师与创意总监 Cho Gi-seok 创立，品牌名是其英文名字拼写的反转。品牌秉承“Right to Fail”（失败的权利）之精神，将前卫的时装剪裁与雕塑、摄影等艺术媒介深度融合。其单品以极具张力的不规则压花、烧灼质感和复杂的解构设计著称，展现出既叛逆又脆弱的先锋美学。
descriptionEn: Founded by acclaimed Korean photographer and creative director Cho Gi-seok, KUSIKOHC is a conceptual label whose name is a phonetic reversal of the designer's own. Operating under the motto 'Right to Fail,' the brand blends avant-garde fashion with photographic and sculptural arts. Its collections feature dramatic textures, burned finishes, and deconstructed details, presenting a raw yet meticulous aesthetic that challenges conventional design boundaries.

name: LE 17 SEPTEMBRE
tagline: Timeless luxury minimalism and structured Korean heritage draping
descriptionZh: LE 17 SEPTEMBRE 成立于 2013 年，由设计师申恩惠创立，以其本人生日命名，是韩国“静奢风（Quiet Luxury）”的杰出代表。品牌追求极致的纯净与简约，选用温润的天然大地色系面料，注重服装的实穿性与不对称裹褶剪裁。其经典的落肩羊毛大衣、针织套裙以及垂坠衬衫，流露出内敛、优雅且富有东方诗意的都市质感。
descriptionEn: Established in 2013 by designer Eunhye Shin and named after her birthday, LE 17 SEPTEMBRE is a leading voice in Korean minimalist luxury. The brand focuses on clean lines, high-quality natural textiles, and muted palettes like beige, gray, and ivory. Known for its asymmetric draping, cozy knit sets, and structured wool coats, the label offers sophisticated, timeless garments that merge traditional Korean aesthetics with modern elegance.

name: Liful (Liful Minimal Garments)
tagline: Minimalist contemporary streetwear and structured basics
descriptionZh: Liful Minimal Garments 成立于2005年，是韩国最早的一批本土潮流设计师品牌。品牌以“极简街头（Minimal Streetwear）”为核心定位。Liful 不去迎合过于浮夸狂野的街头涂鸦，而是专注于柔和的中性色、极其干净利落的几何线条、扎实的高克重毛圈布料和微落肩日常剪裁。其棒球夹克、纯色无帽卫衣和直筒休闲裤完美诠释了低调且有质感的首尔街头风。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2005, Liful Minimal Garments is one of Korea's heritage streetwear labels. Pushing a 'minimal street' philosophy, Liful avoids overly flashy logos in favor of subtle detailing, modern modular utility pockets, and muted, clean earth tones. Its structured basic hoodies, windbreakers, and crop trousers offer a refined casual wardrobe.

name: LMC (Lost Management Cities)
tagline: Graphic-heavy streetwear, skateboarding, and subculture vibes
descriptionZh: LMC（全称 Lost Management Cities）成立于2015年，是韩国著名潮流服饰集团 Layer 旗下的街头支线。品牌灵感来源于大都市的多维生活形态与青年滑板、涂鸦、摇滚等次文化。LMC 的印花连帽衫、尼龙冲锋衣、网眼足球衫和冷帽款式年轻，图章和涂鸦文字极具视觉冲击力，是目前首尔街头年轻一代人手必备的经典潮流运动品牌。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2015 by Korean streetwear giant Layer, LMC (Lost Management Cities) takes inspiration from organic urban landscapes, skate subcultures, and industrial design. The brand specializes in graphic-heavy loose hoodies, technical track windbreakers, soccer jerseys, and beanies that define Seoul's youthful underground street culture.

name: LOEUVRE
tagline: Wearable art inspired by French sensibility, light, and shadow
descriptionZh: LOEUVRE 意为“一件艺术品”，是一个融合法式浪漫复古与现代艺术视角的包袋与成衣品牌。品牌设计深受现代雕塑和光影交织的启发，强调线条、色彩与材质的和谐统一。其经典的 Sac de Lune（月亮包）和 Courbe 弧形包等单品，以流畅的曲线、精致的金属扣件和高实用性深受都市女性青睐。
descriptionEn: Meaning 'a work of art' in French, LOEUVRE is a bag and ready-to-wear label that merges French romanticism with a modern artistic viewpoint. The brand draws creative inspiration from light, shadow, and modernist sculptures, focusing on the harmony of lines, colors, and textures. Signature pieces like the crescent Sac de Lune and the structured Courbe bag feature refined curves and custom hardware, making them elegant yet practical everyday accessories.

name: Low Classic
tagline: Minimalist elegance and structured modern silhouettes
descriptionZh: Low Classic 由三位资深时尚编辑和设计师于2009年创立，是首尔极简主义女性时装的代名词。品牌追求简约而不简单的经典之作，注重服装的利落裁剪、高级面料与实用美学。Low Classic 善于通过大地色系、垂坠感的阔腿裤、挺括的西装外套和几何造型皮包，展现出现代职场女性独立、内敛而又充满艺术气息的高智感美学。
descriptionEn: Established in 2009, Low Classic represents the pinnacle of modern Korean minimalism. The brand focuses on clean lines, high-quality fabrics, and structured draping. With a muted, earthy color palette and sharp tailoring, Low Classic crafts sophisticated daily staples, oversized blazers, and geometric accessories for the modern woman.

name: Lucky Chouette
tagline: Playful retro-classic womenswear combining street graphics and whimsical owls
descriptionZh: Lucky Chouette 是科隆（Kolon）集团旗下备受年轻人喜爱的设计师风格品牌，品牌名字在法语中意为“幸运的猫头鹰”。品牌善于将经典的复古名媛风与街头涂鸦、幽默插画相结合，以各式形态的可爱“猫头鹰”印花作为核心视觉。其标志性单品如荷叶边水手领衬衫、超大廓形拼色卫衣和不对称百褶连衣裙，甜美中透露出叛逆古怪的时尚灵气。
descriptionEn: Lucky Chouette is a popular contemporary brand under Kolon, meaning 'lucky owl' in French and recognized by its signature quirky owl graphics. The brand reinterprets retro-classic feminine silhouettes with a playful street-style twist.

name: LVIR
tagline: Sophisticated womenswear blending soft masculine tailoring with modern practicality
descriptionZh: LVIR 意为“光芒”，是一个致力于通过“柔和的男装剪裁”展现女性内在魅力的韩国现代都市时装品牌。品牌善于将硬朗、松垮的男装西服廓形融入女装设计，创造出利落而优雅的职场与休闲衣橱。其代表单品包括垂坠感连体裤、宽版垫肩西装以及天然棉麻混纺长裙，风格低调干练、质感极佳。
descriptionEn: Derived from the French words for 'the light,' LVIR is a contemporary brand that reinterprets strict masculine tailoring for modern womenswear. The brand balances soft draping, utilitarian workwear, and structured silhouettes in nature-inspired, earthy tones. Signature items such as their oversized blazers, linen blend dresses, and wrap jumpsuits offer a functional, effortlessly chic aesthetic for women across generations.

name: Mardi Mercredi
tagline: Effortless French chic with signature flower graphics
descriptionZh: Mardi Mercredi 成立于2018年，由夫妻档设计师 Hwa-mok Park 和 Lee Soo-hyun 创立，品牌名即法语的“星期二星期三”。品牌以印有巨大绿色或红色小雏菊花朵图案（Flowermardi）的卫衣和T恤而爆火。Matin Kim 主打法式随性风格与轻松的学院风（Preppy Style），利用亮眼的色彩搭配、休闲剪裁与高辨识度印花，快速成为亚洲最受欢迎的日常衣橱单品。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2018 by husband-and-wife duo Hwa-mok Park and Lee Soo-hyun, Mardi Mercredi captures French effortless charm with a Seoul twist. Its hallmark is the iconic oversized green 'Flowermardi' print featured on t-shirts, sweatshirts, and knitwear. The label blends preppy aesthetics, casual elegance, and cozy knits.

name: Margarin Fingers
tagline: Whimsical, lovely girly fashion with creative graphics and retro shapes
descriptionZh: Margarin Fingers 成立于 2010 年，由设计师李珠贤创立，是韩国少女风潮（Girlish style）的代表性小众品牌。品牌善于将复古优雅的剪裁、甜美的印花和童趣十足的花边相结合，展现出俏皮、浪漫的少女感。其标志性单品包括泡泡袖针织开衫、复古格纹连衣裙以及刺绣卫衣，在甜美中带有一丝古灵精怪。
descriptionEn: Established in 2010 by designer Juhyeon Lee, Margarin Fingers is a pioneering Korean label specializing in quirky, feminine, and lovely wardrobes. The brand blends retro silhouettes, candy-colored palettes, and playful floral graphics to create wearable, romantic daily outfits.

name: MARGE SHERWOOD
tagline: Retro 90s nostalgia meets bold contemporary color palettes
descriptionZh: MARGE SHERWOOD 成立于 2016 年，由设计师 Um Sungeun 和 Kim Soonyoung 共同创立，品牌名灵感源自电影《天才雷普利》中的女主角。品牌以 90 年代复古怀旧风格为基调，搭配大胆前卫的欢快色彩和摩登的解构剪裁。其标志性的 VAVA 系列和 Boston 包款，凭借硬朗流畅的线条以及多种背携方式，成为小众时尚圈的经典之作。
descriptionEn: Established in 2016 by designers Um Sungeun and Kim Soonyoung, MARGE SHERWOOD is named after the female lead in the film 'The Talented Mr. Ripley.' The label reinterprets 90s retro nostalgia with bold, playful color palettes and contemporary structured silhouettes. Its signature VAVA shoulder bag and Boston mini bags are highly recognized for their clean lines, versatility, and vibrant vintage aesthetic.

name: Matin Kim
tagline: Y2K-leaning Seoul contemporary and effortless chic
descriptionZh: Matin Kim 由设计师 Kim Da-in 于2015年创立，是目前韩国年轻一代中最炙手可热的现象级女装品牌。品牌主打法式随性（effortless chic）与千禧复古（Y2K）的巧妙融合，标志性单品包括印有金属Logo铁牌的褶皱包、工装裤、破坏风针织衫以及金属搭扣钱包。Matin Kim 善于在简约实穿的日常版型中，加入叛逆、硬朗的工业感细节。
descriptionEn: Founded by Kim Da-in in 2015, Matin Kim has grown into a phenomenon among Korea's youth. The brand offers a seamless mix of Y2K retro, industrial grunge, and effortless French chic. It is widely known for its iconic metal plate logo handbags, cargo pants, and distressed knitwear that combine utility with contemporary fashion.

name: Miamasvin
tagline: Graceful, elegant feminine styles tailored for the modern working woman
descriptionZh: Miamasvin 创立于首尔，品牌名源自世界语，意为“我爱你”。品牌致力于为现代职场女性打造兼具精致优雅与舒适日常的着装，专注于裙装的垂坠质感与裤装的修身线条。其主打单品包括高腰垂坠连体裤、优雅裹身连衣裙和气质雪纺衫，尽显轻熟女性的自信魅力。
descriptionEn: Inspired by the Esperanto phrase for 'I love you,' Miamasvin is a contemporary womenswear brand designed for modern career women. The brand focuses on creating garments that balance professional grace with daily flexibility.

name: Mind Bridge
tagline: Sophisticated business-casual wardrobe blending professional style with daily comfort
descriptionZh: Mind Bridge 成立于 2003 年，是百家好（TBH）集团旗下的主力“商务休闲（Business Casual）”品牌。品牌致力于为都市职场新生代架起“工作与生活”的衣着桥梁，注重使用吸湿排汗、防皱免烫的高科技舒适面料。其经典的修身免烫免褶裤（Slacks）、质感无领夹克和针织Polo衫，以简洁干练的外观和卓越的实用性能畅销不衰。
descriptionEn: Established in 2003, Mind Bridge is a leading business-casual brand under TBH Group, designed to bridge the gap between professional workwear and active daily life. The brand uses high-tech wrinkle-free, breathable fabrics to ensure style and long-lasting comfort.

name: MINJUKIM
tagline: Whimsical, imaginative prints and voluminous, romantic silhouettes
descriptionZh: MINJUKIM 是由 Netflix《时尚裁决（Next in Fashion）》首季冠军金敏珠创立的同名设计师品牌。品牌以天马行空的原创手绘印花、超大版型的伞裙和充满童话色彩的梦幻褶皱闻名。品牌设计洋溢着无拘无束的快乐与少女感，善于用高级时装工艺将纯真浪漫的想象化为极具视觉冲击力的立体轮廓。
descriptionEn: MINJUKIM is the eponymous label of Minju Kim, the winner of Netflix's inaugural season of 'Next in Fashion.' The brand is globally renowned for its whimsical hand-drawn prints, exaggerated voluminous silhouettes, and fairytale-like romanticism. Combining playful femininity with couture-level pattern making, MINJUKIM constructs wearable art pieces, oversized smock dresses, and statement outerwear that radiate joy and artistic freedom.

name: Mixxmix
tagline: Playful retro-street casual wear combining diverse youth subcultures
descriptionZh: Mixxmix 是一个主打年轻一代、玩味复古的韩国潮流服饰线上商城，因高频出现在 K-pop 偶像的私服和舞台服中而大受瞩目。品牌将复古学院风、滑板街头与甜酷风格相融合，推崇“混合搭配”的穿衣态度。其最畅销的单品包括拼色棒球夹克、百褶短裙以及各式印花基本款卫衣。
descriptionEn: Mixxmix is a playful, retro-themed online fashion destination representing South Korea's vibrant youth culture and idol fashion. Blending preppy collegiate wear, street-skateboard vibes, and edgy-chic elements, the brand encourages mixing and matching to express individuality.

name: MIXXO
tagline: Modern office-casual fast fashion and feminine styling for young women
descriptionZh: MIXXO 是衣恋集团旗下专门针对年轻职场女性的代表性快时尚品牌，品牌名源自“Mix & Match”。品牌聚焦于为女性消费者提供紧跟潮流、剪裁利落的西装夹克、知性连衣裙及日常基础款单品。其代表单品包括一扣式干练小西装、高腰直筒西裤和纯色雪纺开衫，以超强的实穿搭配性和高性价比深受白领喜爱。
descriptionEn: MIXXO is a leading fast-fashion brand under E-Land tailored specifically for young working women. The brand provides a wide range of sharp blazers, feminine dresses, and versatile daily coordinates. Famous for its single-button slim-fit blazers.

name: moia
tagline: Natural minimalist lifestyle wear with fluid lines and neutral tones
descriptionZh: moia 倡导“与自然共生”的慢时尚穿衣理念，致力于用舒适亲肤的棉、麻、真丝等天然纤维打造简约都市女装。品牌色彩以纯净的沙色、米白、卡其为主，流露出优雅的度假闲适感。其经典的亚麻阔腿裤、裹身连衣裙和无领简约衬衫，完美契合现代女性对舒适与高级感的双重追求。
descriptionEn: moia focuses on natural minimalism and the slow fashion philosophy, utilizing breathable, organic fibers like cotton, linen, and silk. The brand’s aesthetic is characterized by neutral, earthy tones, clean lines, and soft, loose-fit draping.

name: MÜNN
tagline: Subversive tailoring with raw selvage details and organic layerings
descriptionZh: MÜNN 由设计师韩贤民于 2013 年创立，品牌旨在打破传统高级时装的缝制规则。品牌以“不完整的美学”为核心，大量采用外露缝线（Selvage Stitched）、重构镂空和轻薄欧根纱材质进行男装与女装的叠穿创作。其标志性的解构西装、绑带夹克和纱质层叠风衣，多次在伦敦和巴黎时装周引起轰动。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2013 by Hyun-min Han, MÜNN is a contemporary luxury label that aims to subvert traditional garment construction. The designer is known for his 'incomplete beauty' aesthetic, utilizing raw selvage detailing, fabric restructuring, and translucent organza layering.

name: Naning9
tagline: Effortless, oversized casual clothing for modern comfort and style
descriptionZh: Naning9 成立于 2000 年代，是韩国舒适、随性、大版型（Oversized）日常女装的殿堂级线上商城。品牌随性自在，致力于打造版型极其宽松、手感柔软的棉麻和针织服饰。其标志性的宽松拖地阔腿裤、落肩卫衣大版外套和棉质连衣裙，完美契合了慵懒风美学。
descriptionEn: Established in the early 2000s, Naning9 is a pioneer in oversized, effortless daily wear in South Korea. Committed to comfort and zero-pressure styling, the brand creates garments using soft washed cottons, knits, and loose silhouettes.

name: Neithers
tagline: Utility-focused casual daily wear defined by its signature whale logo
descriptionZh: Neithers 是由设计师 Won Deok-hyun 创立的服装品牌，以可爱的“抹香鲸”刺绣徽标而著称。品牌主打“非此非彼”的中间地带美学，专注于舒适实穿的日常休闲服。其经典的口袋衬衫、开衫开领毛衣以及多功能工装裤大受欢迎。
descriptionEn: Neithers is a Seoul-based casual wear brand founded by Won Deok-hyun, recognized by its signature sperm whale embroidery. Embodying a 'middle ground' aesthetic that avoids specific style tags, the brand focuses on practical daily wear, high-quality fabrication, and functional pattern work.

name: NIEEH
tagline: Minimalist genderless streetwear and accessories favored by youth culture
descriptionZh: NIEEH 是一个主打中性简约风格的韩国街头潮流配饰品牌，因受到多位顶级 K-pop 明星高频上身而在年轻群体中迅速爆火。品牌设计强调自然与不受拘束，选用低调柔和的色调，推出卫衣、运动裤等舒适基础款。其大火的“信封包”和配有半透明厚塑料链条的腋下包，成为引领亚洲千禧辣妹风潮的代表单品。
descriptionEn: NIEEH is a highly sought-after, gender-neutral streetwear and accessory brand representing Seoul's youth culture. The brand favors relaxed, minimalist basics like fleece hoodies and sweatpants in clean, neutral palettes. NIEEH is widely famous for its iconic translucent thick acrylic chain envelope and shoulder bags, which have become a signature staple in contemporary Asian street fashion.

name: NOHANT
tagline: Brunch-look lifestyle, elegant unisex loungewear, and typography
descriptionZh: NOHANT 成立于2012年，由设计师 Noah Nam 创立。品牌主打“早午餐装扮（Brunch Look）”和无性别法式优雅风。NOHANT 最著名的经典系列是与演员刘亚仁联名的“韩文+英文拼音字母（Love City）”T恤，如“한글 (Hangeul) SEOUL”。设计剪裁松弛宽大、触感高级柔软，致力于打造下楼吃早餐也能流露出随性优雅、毫无刻意痕迹的高级日常服饰。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2012 by Noah Nam, NOHANT is famous for popularizing the relaxed 'Brunch Look'—easy, stylish loungewear designed for effortless gender-fluid dressing. It gained massive popularity for its typographic 'Love City' campaign (e.g. merging English and Korean hangul characters). The brand delivers premium, loose-fitting, and cozy knits.

name: Nomanual
tagline: Subversive streetwear with bold graphics and raw urban aesthetics
descriptionZh: Nomanual 成立于首尔，是一个洋溢着叛逆色彩与街头个性的无性别潮流品牌。品牌设计常打破常规教条，通过大胆的数码印花、重工水洗和磨损破坏细节来表达年轻一代的独特态度。旗下备受喜爱的单品包括重磅印花连帽衫、机能风拉链外套和复古破坏风针织衫。
descriptionEn: Nomanual is a Seoul-based streetwear label known for its rebellious attitude and raw, urban aesthetics. The brand rejects conventional rules, expressing youth culture through bold digital graphics, heavy garment washes, and distressed detailing. Its most popular items include heavyweight printed hoodies, tactical zip-up windbreakers, and distressed loose-fit knitwear.

name: Nothing Written
tagline: Quiet, intellectual, and sophisticated classic capsule wardrobe
descriptionZh: Nothing Written 成立于2015年，是一个追求“留白美学”与高品质日常服的韩国独立设计师品牌。品牌摒弃繁复花哨的印花，专注于纯色、高质感的天然面料（羊毛、棉麻、真丝）和无可挑剔的利落裁剪。经典单品包括羊毛开衫、垂感赫本风风衣和挺括直筒裤。其内敛、松弛的高智感冷淡风，完美构筑了知性女性的经典胶囊衣橱。
descriptionEn: Established in 2015, Nothing Written embraces a muted, quiet aesthetic focusing on structured silhouettes and natural fibers like wool, linen, and silk. Rejecting loud graphics and passing trends, Nothing Written creates sophisticated, clean-cut blazers, minimal knits, and tailored trousers for a smart, cohesive capsule wardrobe.

name: OJOS
tagline: Futuristic gorpcore-infused womenswear exploring modular utility and faded aesthetics
descriptionZh: OJOS 是近年来在首尔声名鹊起的前卫女性设计师品牌，设计主打“在褪色事物中发现新形态”。品牌将户外机能风（Gorpcore）与千禧未来主义（Y3K）巧妙融合，极其注重服装的可拆卸性与多功能性。代表单品包括可拆卸吊带短裤、不对称长袖上衣以及解构主义尼龙风衣，为穿着者提供多样的搭配空间。
descriptionEn: OJOS is an avant-garde Korean womenswear label that design around the concept of finding new forms in faded things. The brand seamlessly fuses technical gorpcore utilities with Y3K futurism, emphasizing modularity, raw-cut textures, and intended imperfection. Signature items like their detachable garter shorts and asymmetric scarf tops allow wearers to customize and transform their silhouettes.

name: Open YY
tagline: Bold, rebellious, and retro-chic contemporary womenswear
descriptionZh: Open YY（原名 The Open Product）由金智英和金保英两姐妹于2020年创办，是近年来首尔女装界的一匹黑马。品牌倡导打破常规、拥抱多元个性，将复古休闲、老爹运动风与辣妹美学完美揉捏。其露脐剪裁、系带镂空、机车卫衣和经典刺绣棒球帽充满张扬、随性且有些酷拽的街头气质，深刻影响了年轻世代的潮流审美偏好。
descriptionEn: Open YY (formerly known as The Open Product) was launched in 2020 by sisters Ji-young and Bo-young Kim. The label champions bold self-expression, blending Y2K sportswear, biker aesthetics, and feminine cutouts. Known for its cropped polo shirts, knit sets, and logo caps, Open YY offers high-spirited fashion for the rebellious.

name: OSOI
tagline: Timeless, sculptural leather accessories and signature footwear
descriptionZh: OSOI 成立于 2016 年，是一家主打雕塑感包袋与鞋履的韩国设计师品牌。其名字来源于日语中的“慢（Slow）”，旨在传达出不随波逐流、追求慢时尚与经典永恒的品牌理念。旗下标志性单品包括半月形 Toni 包和 Brot 口金包系列，以利落的几何线条和独特的功能性肩带调节设计风靡时尚圈。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2016, OSOI is a designer label specializing in sculptural, architectural leather bags and footwear. Its name is derived from the Japanese word for 'slow,' reflecting a commitment to slow fashion and timeless craftsmanship over fleeting trends. The brand is best known for its crescent-shaped Toni bag and the Brot clasp-bag series, celebrated for their clean geometric lines and innovative adjustable strap systems.

name: OY
tagline: Dark gothic streetwear, hardware chains, and metal details
descriptionZh: OY 成立于2015年，由设计师 Byung-jun Kim 创立，代表着“你与我”（O represents you, Y represents me）。品牌主打无性别暗黑系街头风（Dark Gothic Streetwear），极具辨识度的是设计中大量引入银色粗金属链条、铁环、拉链镂空和反光反差材质。设计偏向重金属朋克与暗黑街头风，版型宽大帅气，受到许多潮酷街舞男女的追捧。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2015, OY (representing You and Me) is a Seoul-based dark-wear brand that features industrial metal chains, cargo ringlets, heavy contrast lockets, and reflective zippers on unisex blazers, shirts, and crop tops. The brand provides a sleek gothic punk option within the modern Korean street landscape.

name: PAIN OR PLEASURE
tagline: Delicate, sensual feminine aesthetics inspired by Balletcore and fluid lines
descriptionZh: PAIN OR PLEASURE 成立于首尔，是当下韩国“芭蕾风（Balletcore）”与解构主义结合的代表性品牌。品牌擅长运用亲肤的高弹面料、蕾丝、缎带与褶皱，勾勒出如雕塑般精致而又充满呼吸感的女性轮廓。其标志性单品包括挂脖系带露肩上衣、不对称针织开衫以及抓褶短裙，在优雅中透露出一丝恰到好处的叛逆感。
descriptionEn: PAIN OR PLEASURE is a Seoul-based label that has become a defining name in the 'Balletcore' and feminine streetwear scene. The brand utilizes body-conscious fabrics, delicate ties, shirring, and laces to emphasize fluid lines and a sensual, sculptural feminine silhouette. Best known for their ribbon-detailed tops, asymmetric boleros, and draped skirts, the brand blends delicate romance with modern edge.

name: Partysu
tagline: Sophisticated high-end chic fashion with artistic silhouettes and premium fabrics
descriptionZh: Partysu 成立于首尔，是主打“极简轻奢、独立英气”的高端淑女风线上品牌。品牌摒弃了过于甜美的少女装饰，转向挺括利落的时装廓形和高级质感的冷色调天然面料。旗下经典的系带西装大衣、不对称垂坠衬衫和修身一步裙，散发着都市成熟女性高贵、知性而利落的气质。
descriptionEn: Partysu is a high-end Korean online brand known for its sophisticated chic, structured cuts, and premium material quality. Moving away from typical girly decorations, the brand creates clean, architectural clothing using cool neutral tones.

name: Post Archive Faction (PAF)
tagline: Deconstructed, modular technical gear and dark-wear
descriptionZh: Post Archive Faction (PAF) 成立于2018年，由 Lim Dong-jun 创立，是世界先锋机能时尚的代表性品牌。品牌以“档案解构”为核心，将设计分为 RIGHT（保守、渐进）、CENTER（实验、核心）和 LEFT（激进、解构）三个平行支线。其标志性的不规则折皱、不对称拉链、模块化插袋、高性能弹性面料以及防撕裂技术，彻底模糊了前卫高级时装与户外越野机能的界限。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2018 by Lim Dong-jun, Post Archive Faction (PAF) is a global pioneer in functional, tech-forward avant-garde fashion. Structuring its collections into three iterative categories (Right, Center, Left), the label is renowned for its organic asymmetry, dynamic crinkling techniques, hidden utility zippers, and modular designs.

name: pushBUTTON
tagline: Whimsical avant-garde fashion blending gender boundaries and eccentric tailoring
descriptionZh: pushBUTTON 由前歌手朴承乾于 2003 年创立，是韩国最具玩味与叛逆色彩的先锋设计师品牌。品牌以天马行空的印花、夸张的大垫肩剪裁以及刻意模糊性别的中性廓形而闻名全球。其代表作如不对称拼接衬衫、复古格纹大垫肩西装和超大号开叉裙，散发着张扬、前卫且复古的摩登张力。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2003 by Park Seung-gun, pushBUTTON is one of South Korea's most whimsical and avant-garde designer brands. The label is celebrated for its gender-bending silhouettes, eccentric graphic prints, and dramatic proportions.

name: RECTO
tagline: Artistic, structured contemporary tailoring and vintage mood
descriptionZh: RECTO 由设计师 Jung Ji-yeon 于2015年创立，品牌名意为纸张的“正面”或“右页”，代表着干练与未着墨的无限可能。RECTO 的服饰拥有极强的雕塑感和几何裁剪风格，擅长在男装的刚毅轮廓中融入女装的流线型弧度。不对称衬衫、大垫肩西装外套、不对称领口针织衫是其经典之作，呈现出一种复古与现代、英气与温柔并存的智性高级感。
descriptionEn: Named after the right-hand page of a book, RECTO was founded by Jung Ji-yeon in 2015 to signify a fresh, clean slate. The label is celebrated for its sculptural, structured tailoring and clever play with gender boundaries—fluid silhouettes meet strong, structured shoulders. RECTO delivers timeless, understated, and artistic luxury pieces.

name: REIKE NEN
tagline: Modern vintage footwear and handbags with a touch of asymmetry
descriptionZh: REIKE NEN 成立于 2010 年，是首尔最具代表性的设计师鞋履与包袋品牌之一。品牌以“Modern Vintage（现代复古）”为核心，善于在经典的鞋履包袋版型中融入不对称弧线、特制搭扣和编织皮质细节。其经典的粗跟切尔西靴、流线形单鞋和 Pebble（卵石）包款，既传承了复古格调又不失现代趣味。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2010, REIKE NEN is a prominent Seoul-based footwear and handbag label that reinterprets classic silhouettes with a 'modern vintage' sensibility. The brand incorporates unique details such as asymmetrical lines, woven leather textures, and custom metal closures. Popular items like their signature block-heel boots, slip-ons, and structured Pebble bags offer a sophisticated balance between timeless design and contemporary flair.

name: Rest & Recreation (R&R)
tagline: Sporty preppy athleisure and effortless daily streetwear
descriptionZh: Rest & Recreation (R&R) 由韩国著名设计师金智恩（Ji-eun Kim，前 Fleamadonna 设计师）于2022年创办。品牌以标志性的双“R”环状交叉 Logo 为特色，主打轻松、运动的法式网球学院风与日常休闲街头装的结合。R&R 的紧身短款T恤、刺绣棒球帽、运动卫衣和短裙版型利落显瘦，既能日常休闲通勤，也适合户外网球、高尔夫等运动场景。
descriptionEn: Rest & Recreation (R&R) was founded in 2022 by Ji-eun Kim, the former designer of Fleamadonna. Marked by its signature interlocking double-R logo emblem, R&R delivers casual preppy athleisure, tight crop tees, sporty sweat sets, and caps. The brand blends comfort and tennis-court chic into an everyday street uniform.

name: Roem
tagline: Sweet romantic feminine dailywear and elegant formal dresses for young women
descriptionZh: Roem 是韩国衣恋集团旗下的代表性浪漫主义轻熟女装品牌，在韩文中意为“罗马”，代表浪漫与优雅。品牌主打温婉柔和的粉紫色调，将法式小香风、荷叶边与收腰设计运用得炉火纯青。其经典的粗花呢小香风套装（Tweed Set）、蕾丝立领连衣裙和羊毛收腰呢大衣，是展现优雅端庄淑女风范的代表性单品。
descriptionEn: Roem is a popular romantic womenswear brand under E-Land, taking its name from the Dutch word for fame and glory, and focusing on elegant femininity. The brand utilizes soft pastels, lace, and tweed fabrics to craft gentle, sophisticated daily outfits.

name: ROKH
tagline: Deconstructed raw tailoring and elegant, subversive feminine classics
descriptionZh: ROKH 是由韩裔设计师 Rok Hwang（曾任职于 Céline）创立的伦敦高级时装品牌，以其无可挑剔的解构主义裁剪著称。品牌主打将传统男装剪裁、经典风衣等日常单品打碎重组，呈现出极具破坏美学又极度优雅的女性魅力。其多纽扣解构风衣、镂空西装外套及不规则半裙是其代表作，展现出严谨而带有一丝暗黑个性的高智美感。
descriptionEn: Founded by Celine alumnus Rok Hwang, ROKH is an international fashion house renowned for its raw, deconstructed approach to classic tailoring. The brand focuses on dismantling and rebuilding wardrobe staples—especially trench coats, double-breasted blazers, and pleated skirts—using multiple button closures and asymmetric cut-outs. ROKH presents an elegant yet slightly rebellious aesthetic that merges precise craftsmanship with dark, cerebral femininity.

name: Samo Ondoh
tagline: Quirky, structural, and playful statement bags
descriptionZh: Samo Ondoh 意为“相同的温度”，由一对设计师夫妇共同创立。品牌以脑洞大开、极具雕塑感的包袋廓形而著称，主打怪诞可爱与大胆个性的先锋路线。明星单品包括形状圆滚像饺子的 Gnocchi 包、抓褶蓬松的 Bun 枕头包以及配有各式金属链条的个性包袋。Samo Ondoh 大量使用明亮、饱满的跳跃色彩，是年轻潮流男女彰显时尚态度的绝佳 Statement 配饰。
descriptionEn: Samo Ondoh, translating to 'same temperature,' is a conceptual designer bag brand co-founded by a designer couple. Famous for its sculptural, puffy silhouettes and bold, offbeat styling, the brand's Gnocchi (dumpling-like) bag and Bun pocket clutches utilize rich color palettes, vegan leather, and playful chain details.

name: SAN SAN GEAR
tagline: Subculture-driven technical techwear and urban outdoor gear
descriptionZh: SAN SAN GEAR 成立于 2019 年，是韩国机能户外风格（Gorpcore）与街头潮流的领军品牌，名字中的“SAN”即韩语中的“山”。品牌擅长将高科技面料、复杂的拉链结构和模块化口袋融入日常都市便服。其极具动感且利落的防风夹克、褶皱长裤以及异形冷帽，深受年轻一代以及户外运动爱好者追捧。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2019, SAN SAN GEAR is a prominent Korean techwear brand, taking its name from the Korean word for mountain ('san') to signify its outdoor roots. The brand reinterprets technical outdoor apparel through a subcultural street lens, utilizing high-performance fabrics, intricate zipper systems, and anatomical paneling. Its windbreakers, utility cargo trousers, and paneled beanies are celebrated for balancing streetwear style with outdoor functionality.

name: SATUR
tagline: Relaxed, high-quality menswear capturing the laid-back mood of a Saturday
descriptionZh: SATUR 成立于首尔，品牌名意为“星期六（Saturday）”，致力于打造洋溢着周六度假般轻松愉悦感的男装成衣。品牌倡导“自然休闲（Natural Leisure）”的生活美学，极其注重精细的针织编织工艺与版型的舒适度。其备受追捧的单品包括粗针绞花毛衣、休闲棉麻衬衫以及天鹅绒运动夹克，流露出慵懒温润的暖男气质。
descriptionEn: SATUR is a contemporary Seoul brand designed to capture the cozy, laid-back mood of a Saturday afternoon. Advocating a 'Natural Leisure' lifestyle, the brand creates high-quality, comfortable menswear using premium fabrics and soft knit structures. Best-selling items include their chunky cable-knit sweaters, relaxed linen resort shirts, and velour track jackets that blend everyday comfort with understated luxury.

name: Sculptor
tagline: Rebellious Y2K streetwear and vintage grunge aesthetics
descriptionZh: Sculptor 成立于2012年，是一个极富反叛叛逆色彩的街头潮牌。品牌理念为“雕刻师”，寓意如同雕刻艺术品般打磨服饰。Sculptor 大胆玩转千禧年代复古风（Y2K）、哥特印花、破坏感针织和美式复古校园装。其撞色短吊带、拼色工装长裤、扎染网纱打底衫是个性辣妹与亚文化青年的必备之物，洋溢着张扬不羁的青春活力。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2012, Sculptor is a rebellious Seoul streetwear brand capturing vintage grunge and Y2K aesthetic sensibilities. Drawing inspiration from subcultures, Sculptor features crop tees, multi-pocket utility cargo pants, bleached denim, and distressed knits that offer a cool, sporty, and distinctly retro edge.

name: Sienne
tagline: Warm vintage Parisian mood and texturized classic garments
descriptionZh: Sienne 成立于2020年，品牌名在法语中意为“她的”。Sienne 善于用细腻的材质纹理和复古的细节去讲述穿衣的故事。品牌最经典的单品是多色褶皱软糯的 Sienne 填充棉帆布包（Padding Bag）、绞花针织衫和厚呢子大衣。Sienne 的服饰散发出一种温暖、舒适的复古法式街头感，像一杯午后的红茶，将日常的温柔包裹在挺括的质感中。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2020, Sienne, meaning 'hers' in French, is highly regarded for its texture-heavy classic pieces and vintage Parisian mood. Widely recognized for its textured Padding canvas tote bag, chunky cable knitwear, and vintage plaid blazers, Sienne crafts warm, gentle, and tactile staples for the romantic soul.

name: SJSJ
tagline: Artistic, playful contemporary fashion with creative shapes and youthful charm
descriptionZh: SJSJ 是 Handsome 集团旗下专为年轻一代打造的高端设计师品牌，设计主打艺术想象力与现代少女感的结合。品牌不拘泥于传统束缚，善于将欢快的明亮色彩、拼贴印花和不对称折褶融入日常时装。其极具设计感的拼接卫衣、趣味印花针织衫和褶皱不对称中裙，为讲究设计感的年轻女性提供了独一无二的品质之选。
descriptionEn: SJSJ is a premium contemporary womenswear brand under Handsome Corp, designed to target a younger, artistic demographic. The brand focuses on merging creative silhouettes, vibrant colors, and patchwork details to express youthful energy.

name: SJYP
tagline: Creative designer denim and high-energy contemporary street casuals
descriptionZh: SJYP 是由韩国明星设计师夫妇 Steve J 和 Yoni P 创立的高档潮流牛仔品牌，目前隶属于 Handsome 集团。品牌将充满活力的英伦庞克与首尔街头风尚融入牛仔设计，打破了单宁服饰的常规，以独创的蓝黄撞色、猫须破洞和毛边流苏而名噪一时。其解构双腰牛仔裤、拼接牛仔短外套以及印花卫衣，是 K-pop 明星和潮流人士的衣橱宠儿。
descriptionEn: Created by star designer duo Steve J and Yoni P and now managed by Handsome Corp, SJYP is a premium designer denim and contemporary label. The brand infuses British punk vibes and Seoul street style into denim wear.

name: Solid Homme
tagline: Minimalist, sleek, and high-quality contemporary menswear
descriptionZh: Solid Homme 由设计师 Youngmi Woo 于1988年创立，是韩国本土最早的高端当代设计师男装品牌。相较于同设计师的先锋牌 Wooyoungmi，Solid Homme 更偏向都市精英、极简利落的冷淡风商务与生活装。品牌以高档面料、绝佳的版型贴合度和低调高贵的深灰色、黑色、海军蓝为主，完美修饰身形，代表着韩国高端男装长达数十年的顶尖标准。
descriptionEn: Established in 1988 by designer Youngmi Woo, Solid Homme is South Korea's iconic luxury contemporary menswear label. Emphasizing clean modern lines, structural tailoring, and functional premium fabrics, Solid Homme offers sleek, minimalist outerwear, clean-cut knit sweaters, and trousers for the sophisticated metropolitan man.

name: SPAO
tagline: Trendy, affordable fast fashion and popular character collaborations for everyone
descriptionZh: SPAO 是韩国衣恋（E-Land）集团于 2009 年创立的国民级快时尚品牌，主打基础休闲与潮流服饰。品牌以极具价格竞争力的国民基本款、保暖内衣（Warm-Wear）以及频繁的跨界动漫和明星联名（如哈利波特、蜡笔小新等）而享誉韩国。其代表性单品如蓬松面包羽绒服、高弹牛仔裤和可爱的联名睡衣，是每个韩国人家喻户晓的必备品。
descriptionEn: SPAO, established in 2009 by E-Land, is a national fast-fashion brand in South Korea providing trendy and affordable basics. The brand is highly famous for its daily activewear, 'Warm-Wear' thermals, and widely popular licensing collaborations.

name: Stand Oil
tagline: Minimalist everyday vegan leather handbags and accessories
descriptionZh: Stand Oil 是近年在小红书及韩国本土红透半边天的设计师包袋品牌。品牌主打“日常、百搭”的设计哲学，坚持使用环保纯素皮革（Vegan Leather）。其包袋设计极简，多使用柔和的莫兰迪色系和百搭的大地色，经典单品包括 Oblong 托特包、Chubby 胖胖包和 Post 邮差包。Stand Oil 包型流畅，容量实用，价格亲民，是韩系温柔穿搭不可或缺的配饰。
descriptionEn: Stand Oil is a highly popular vegan leather handbag brand from Seoul, focusing on classic, minimalist, and functional designs for daily life. Embracing the 'classic bag for everyday' philosophy, Stand Oil utilizes smooth eco-friendly vegan leather, neutral colors, and structural forms seen in their best-selling Oblong and Chubby bags.

name: Stylenanda
tagline: Trendy, youth-centric street fashion and iconic cosmetics for the bold
descriptionZh: Stylenanda 成立于 2005 年，是韩国第一代最具传奇色彩的时尚女装和美妆（旗下包含 3CE）线上商城。品牌主打个性十足、色彩明艳的复古街头风与甜辣风，深受中韩等亚洲年轻女孩的追捧。其标志性单品包括色彩鲜艳的针织开衫、复古水洗牛仔裤以及各类甜辣风修身上衣。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2005, Stylenanda is South Korea's legendary first-generation online fashion mall, also famous for its makeup line 3CE. The brand specializes in bold, colorful retro-streetwear and sweet-edgy styles that capture youthful energy. Signature items include vibrant knit cardigans, vintage-washed denim, and cropped fitted tops that define modern Asian street style.

name: SYSTEM
tagline: Chic contemporary womenswear defining modern tailored city wardrobes
descriptionZh: SYSTEM 成立于 1990 年，是韩国时尚巨头 Handsome 集团旗下的殿堂级现代女装品牌，也是韩式都市知性剪裁（Modern Tailoring）的标杆。品牌主打干练利落的线条感、黑白灰无彩色系以及富有建筑艺术美感的不规则设计。其经典的落肩西裁、不对称针织衫和垂坠感长裤，是韩国都市职业女性衣橱中的品质担当。
descriptionEn: Founded in 1990 by Handsome Corp, SYSTEM is a legendary Korean contemporary brand that set the benchmark for modern tailored womenswear. Known for its structural, clean lines, and achromatic palettes, the label balances classic city wardrobes with avant-garde details.

name: Tamburins
tagline: Sensorial personal care, artistic perfumes, and lifestyle design
descriptionZh: Tamburins 是著名眼镜潮牌 Gentle Monster 旗下的艺术美妆及香氛生活方式品牌。品牌秉持“艺术性的触感”理念，将护手霜、香水、香氛蜡烛等个护品包装设计成充满空间感、雕塑感的艺术摆件（如爆火的链条护手霜、贝壳香水）。Tamburins 的实体店通常设计成画廊或艺术展厅，通过极富诗意与冲突感的感官体验，打造高格调的现代香氛艺术。
descriptionEn: An offshoot of the optical brand Gentle Monster, Tamburins is a luxury scent and cosmetics brand that focuses on 'artistic sensory touch.' Renowned for turning hand creams and solid perfumes into tactile sculptures (like their shell-shaped hand cream and chain moisturizers), Tamburins fuses fragrance, fine art, and geometric product design.

name: The Barnnet
tagline: Vintage-inspired romantic classics with a nostalgic, lovely mood
descriptionZh: The Barnnet 是首尔极具文艺少女气息的设计师品牌，设计中弥漫着浓郁的英伦复古与庄园田园风情。品牌主打“历久弥新”的永恒设计，注重采用重工针织花纹、蕾丝花边和优雅的排扣细节。旗下经典的绞花开衫、小翻领衬衫和蓬松蓬蓬裙，勾勒出优雅而带有一丝俏皮的法式复古名媛感。
descriptionEn: The Barnnet is a romantic designer brand inspired by British vintage aesthetics and country cottage moods. Emphasizing timeless design values, the label incorporates delicate lace trims, vintage knit patterns, and elegant collar details into their collections.

name: The Museum Visitor
tagline: Artistic contemporary fashion treating garments as wearable hand-painted canvases
descriptionZh: The Museum Visitor 是由艺术家兼设计师 Park Moon-su 创立的极具先锋艺术气息的设计师品牌。品牌将服装视为流动的画布，大量运用手绘涂鸦、解构泼墨和带有童趣的心形、花朵图案。其经典的喷漆涂鸦卫衣、带有手绘刺绣的夹克以及不规则剪裁针织衫，展现出打破时尚与纯艺术界限的独特人文魅力。
descriptionEn: Founded by artist-designer Park Moon-su, The Museum Visitor is a highly artistic label that treats apparel as wearable hand-painted canvases. The brand is distinguished by its playful hand-drawn doodles, spray-paint graffiti, and embroidered heart and flower motifs. Its graphic hoodies, hand-painted denim, and raw-edged knits are deeply popular among the younger generation for blurring the boundary between contemporary fashion and fine art.

name: thisisneverthat
tagline: The blueprint of modern Korean street culture and skatewear
descriptionZh: thisisneverthat 成立于2010年，由 Cho Nadan、Choi Jonkyu 和 Park Inwook 共同创立，被誉为“韩国的 Supreme”。品牌扎根于滑板、Hip-Hop 和 90 年代美式复古运动文化。其宽松帽衫、字母印花T恤、教练夹克和工装裤是其核心主打。品牌极具号召力，频繁与 New Balance、Converse 等联名，代表着原汁原味的首尔街头潮流文化。
descriptionEn: Established in 2010, thisisneverthat is widely considered the blueprint of modern Seoul streetwear. Merging 1990s skate culture, hip-hop, and classic athletic wear, the brand specializes in collegiate sweaters, heavy graphic tees, and nylon track pants, establishing a massive cult following and key collaborations globally.

name: Thug Club
tagline: Rebellious biker-gothic streetwear and heavy metal hardware
descriptionZh: Thug Club 成立于2021年，由首尔先锋主脑 Min-jun Yeo 和 Jiyong Kim 创立，是近年来席卷全球的暗黑摇滚/机车风（Biker Gothic）潮牌。品牌将重工业风的骷髅金属硬件、五角星皮带、磨损牛仔以及美式机车拉链融入设计，极度狂野且充满街头张力。Thug Club 的大号骷髅金属拉链帽衫不仅在首尔秒售罄，也收获了包括 A$AP Rocky 等国际巨星的疯狂带货。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2021 by Yeo Min-jun, Thug Club has quickly risen to global prominence in the gothic-biker streetwear scene. Characterized by aggressive metal hardware, heavy zippers, pentagram buckled belts, and raw distressed denim, Thug Club represents a wild, uncompromising subcultural expression originating from Seoul.

name: Thursday Island
tagline: Free-spirited bohemian casual wear with romantic vintage prints
descriptionZh: Thursday Island 成立于 2000 年，是一个主打“周四岛屿旅行”般轻松惬意、向往自然生活方式的波西米亚复古风女装品牌。品牌以大面积的浪漫碎花、印花棉麻和精致的手工刺绣而独树一帜，致力于营造无拘无束的度假氛围。其经典的森林系碎花连衣裙、提花针织开衫和羊羔毛背心，洋溢着温暖怀旧的浪漫风情。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2000, Thursday Island is a bohemian-casual brand inspired by the relaxed, nature-loving vibe of a getaway island. The label is celebrated for its romantic floral prints, soft natural cotton-linen blends, and delicate embroidery details.

name: TIME
tagline: Ultra-sophisticated, minimalist luxury contemporary fashion and sharp tailoring
descriptionZh: TIME 是 Handsome 集团旗下最顶级的现代奢华女装品牌，被誉为韩国高端时装界的“金字招牌”。品牌倡导“无时间的永恒经典（Timeless）”，以极其奢侈的高档羊绒、真丝面料和堪比定制的手工剪裁闻名。其挺括的长款羊绒大衣、质感干练的职业套装和简约流线型长裙，流露出尊贵、理性而高智的大女主气场。
descriptionEn: TIME is the flagship luxury contemporary brand under Handsome Corp, recognized as the gold standard of high-end Korean fashion. Emphasizing a 'timeless' design language, the brand is celebrated for its ultra-premium cashmere, silk fabrics, and bespoke-quality tailoring.

name: Toae
tagline: Modern minimalist leather bags with refined geometric structures
descriptionZh: Toae（亦称 The Toé）是一个专注于以精巧弧线和极简几何结构为特点的韩国设计师皮包品牌。品牌倡导“低调、干练而富有质感”的包袋美学，精心选用优质牛皮，拒绝繁琐的金属配饰以衬托皮质天然光泽。其经典的托特包、弧形肩背包以及马鞍包，以高级的配色和实用的内部大空间，备受现代极简主义者的喜爱。
descriptionEn: Toae (also known as The Toé) is a Korean bag brand that focuses on clean geometric structures and soft, elegant curves. Embracing an aesthetic of low-key refinement, the brand uses premium calfskin leather and minimizes metallic hardware to highlight the natural leather grain.

name: TOPTEN10
tagline: Essential daily wear offering high-quality basics at reasonable prices
descriptionZh: TOPTEN10 是韩国新星通商于 2012 年推出的平价国民服饰品牌，以提供“人生中最基础的 10 种时尚必备款”为宗旨。品牌主打高品质、极致性价比的基础打底衫、发热内衣（ON-Air）以及轻便羽绒服，定位类似于日本优衣库。其经典的超轻羽绒马夹、高品质棉T恤和居家休闲裤，凭借出色的舒适度赢得了各个年龄层消费者的喜爱。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2012 by Shinsung Tongsang, TOPTEN10 is a leading Korean everyday basic wear brand inspired by the idea of providing the 10 most essential apparel items. Similar to Japan's Uniqlo, the label focuses on ultimate value and comfort.

name: Twee
tagline: Lovely, romantic fast-contemporary womenswear with trendy street style
descriptionZh: Twee 是韩国非常知名的快时尚少女潮流品牌，致力于将最前沿的流行趋势快速转化为实穿服饰。品牌主打韩系浪漫少女感与街头休闲风的混搭，设计中常出现碎花、泡泡袖、蕾丝等元气满满的元素。其经典的浪漫花朵连衣裙、短款糖果色针织开衫以及百搭牛仔裙，展现出明亮、活泼的少女气息。
descriptionEn: Twee is a popular Korean fast-contemporary brand that delivers romantic, feminine, and trendy street fashions to youth. Blending sweet, lovely sensibilities with casual streetwear, the label frequently incorporates floral prints, puff sleeves, and lace detailing.

name: Uniform Bridge
tagline: Timeless military, outdoor, and vintage-casual daily wear
descriptionZh: Uniform Bridge 成立于 2013 年，是韩国复古休闲风潮中不可或缺的基石品牌。品牌致力于将复古军装、户外越野以及经典美式复古（Amekaji）元素转化为适合日常穿着的简约基础款。其标志性单品包括 M65 军风夹克、松紧腰带休闲工装裤和多功能战术马甲，做工考究且极其易于叠穿。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2013, Uniform Bridge is a cornerstone of the Korean vintage-casual and military-inspired fashion scene. The label specializes in transforming heritage military, outdoor, and sportswear gear into accessible, modern wardrobe staples. Their M65 jackets, wide-leg fatigue pants, and utility tactical vests are highly regarded for their high-quality materials, functional details, and clean layering versatility.

name: We11done
tagline: Ironic, maximalist luxury streetwear for the new generation
descriptionZh: We11done 由 Jessica Jung（郑惠敏）和 Dami Kwon（权达美，权志龙的姐姐）于2015年共同创立，源自首尔顶尖潮流买手店 Rare Market。品牌名隐喻“做得好”与“11位初始团队成员”。We11done 主打无性别概念与高级时装裁剪的街头化表达，以宽大落肩廓形、经典Logo卫衣、老爹皮衣和充满讽刺艺术的印花闻名，已成为全球顶流明星的衣橱常客。
descriptionEn: Co-founded by Jessica Jung and Dami Kwon in 2015, We11done emerged from Rare Market, Seoul's premier concept store. The brand blends high-fashion tailoring with casual luxury streetwear. Best known for its oversized blazers, leather jackets, and bold graphic tees, We11done redefines retro styles with a futuristic and gender-fluid edge.

name: WHO.A.U
tagline: California-inspired collegiate street casuals and relaxed everyday sportswear
descriptionZh: WHO.A.U 成立于 2000 年，是衣恋集团旗下极具人气的运动休闲美式街头品牌，设计灵感来自美国加州的冲浪与常青藤学院文化。品牌选用舒适耐磨的重磅纯棉，推出印有小熊（Steve Bear）刺绣与加利福尼亚字母的日常运动服。其王牌单品包括刺绣小熊连帽卫衣、重磅美式工装夹克和复古刺绣棒球服，极具运动阳光的青春活力。
descriptionEn: Founded in 2000 by E-Land, WHO.A.U is a popular sportswear brand inspired by the sunny surf culture and preppy Ivy League lifestyle of California. Utilizing heavyweight cottons and dynamic lettering, the brand features its iconic mascot 'Steve the Bear.'

name: Wnderkammer
tagline: Quiet, unadorned contemporary womenswear with architectural draping
descriptionZh: Wnderkammer 名字源自德语的“珍奇屋”，象征着将回忆与艺术灵感珍藏于服装之中。品牌推崇自然、洗练且富有雕塑美感的设计，注重极佳的手感和低调的缝纫细节。其招牌衬衫裙、围裹式长裙及不对称领口上衣，在纯净简约中展现出都市知性女性的不凡品位。
descriptionEn: Named after the German term for 'cabinet of curiosities,' Wnderkammer crafts clean-cut womenswear meant to encapsulate art and memories. The label focuses on soft, organic textiles, structured draping, and subtle sewing details to create timeless daily wardrobes.

name: Wooyoungmi
tagline: Paris-presented high-end luxury menswear and artful tailoring
descriptionZh: Wooyoungmi 由设计师 Youngmi Woo 于2002年在巴黎创办，是韩国首个在巴黎男装周官方日程走秀的高端男装奢牌，也是韩国男装设计走向世界的丰碑。品牌致力于通过精致利落的男装裁剪、解构西装版型、建筑感的宽肩线条和背面标志性的方形金属牌（Square Label），打造前卫、诗意且极具巴黎沙龙气质的艺术男士时装。
descriptionEn: Launched in Paris in 2002 by Youngmi Woo, Wooyoungmi is South Korea's premier luxury menswear label presenting at Paris Fashion Week. The brand redefines classic tailoring with an artistic, romantic, and architectural silhouette. Famous for its structural wool coats, boxy blazers, and the signature metallic square logo at the back.

name: XLIM
tagline: Narrative-driven architectural technical garments exploring memory and space
descriptionZh: XLIM 是一个将建筑、艺术与高级时装相融合的韩国先锋创意厂牌，其服饰按“Episode”（章节）发布。品牌在设计上追求极致的面料肌理研发与复杂的拼接工艺，灵感多来自都市废墟、回忆与大自然。其代表性的解构防风夹克、渐变晕染针织衫和褶皱长裤，展现出空灵且极具质感的未来工装美学。
descriptionEn: Operating as an artistic collective, XLIM designs technical garments that bridge fashion, architecture, and art, releasing collections in narrative-driven 'episodes.' The label focuses on advanced textile manipulation, intricate pattern-cutting, and organic paneling inspired by urban spaces and nature. Its structural zip-up windbreakers and textured, garment-dyed trousers offer a sophisticated, modern techwear aesthetic.

name: Yeseyesee
tagline: Playful, colorful graphic streetwear with a witty attitude
descriptionZh: Yeseyesee 成立于2017年，是著名滑板潮牌 thisisneverthat 旗下的兄弟街头品牌。品牌理念为“一千个读者有一千个哈姆雷特”，强调人们对同一件事物具有多元看法。Yeseyesee 充满天马行空的趣味色彩拼接、滑稽的怪异手绘插画和高饱和度渐变渲染。其设计更加年轻活泼、充满怪诞的少年幽默感，是首尔街头年轻人的心头好。
descriptionEn: Launched in 2017 under the umbrella of thisisneverthat, Yeseyesee stands for personal interpretation of visual design. Known for its quirky hand-drawn doodles, high-saturation tie-dyes, and blocky typographic fonts on relaxed t-shirts and fleece outerwear, the brand brings a playful, witty energy to contemporary streetwear.

name: Youth
tagline: Modern minimalist menswear and contemporary wardrobe essentials
descriptionZh: Youth 专注于打造现代都市的极简主义男装。品牌强调高品质的面料手感与自然流畅的廓形剪裁，旨在为日常衣橱提供质感卓越的基础单品。其标志性单品包括宽版落肩西装、宽松垂坠长裤以及高品质羊毛大衣。
descriptionEn: Youth is a contemporary label that focuses on minimalist wardrobe essentials. The brand is celebrated for its precise fabric selection, relaxed draping, and clean, natural silhouettes. Signature pieces include oversized tailored blazers, fluid wide-leg trousers, and high-quality wool overcoats.

name: YUSE
tagline: Creative contemporary streetwear blending contradictory elements and seasonal trends
descriptionZh: YUSE 成立于 2020 年，是一个深受千禧一代和 K-pop 明星喜爱的无性别设计师潮流品牌。品牌擅长将截然不同的元素相互碰撞，在迎合当下流行的同时保持特立独行的先锋个性。其招牌单品包括不对称羊绒套头针织衫、多口袋工装裤及独特的抽褶开叉背心，洋溢着张扬而性感的废土风情。
descriptionEn: Established in 2020, YUSE is a gender-fluid designer label highly popular among youth and K-pop idols. The brand specializes in merging contrasting elements to create cohesive, trend-setting designs that balance mainstream appeal with a rebellious edge. Signature pieces include asymmetrical cashmere bolero knits, drawstring cargo pants, and distressed cut-out tops that define modern Korean streetwear.
